item.input: How do I create an account?
item.expected_answer: Click “Sign Up,” enter your email, set a password, and verify via email. It takes less than two minutes.

item.input: I forgot my password. How can I reset it?
item.expected_answer: Use the “Forgot Password” link on the login page. A reset email will arrive instantly; if not, check your spam folder.

item.input: Can I change my email address?
item.expected_answer: Yes. Go to Account Settings → Profile → Edit Email and confirm through a verification link.

item.input: Why didn’t I receive a verification email?
item.expected_answer: It may have landed in spam. If not, request another in Account Settings.

item.input: How do I permanently delete my account?
item.expected_answer: Submit a deletion request via Support. We will fully erase your account and data within 30 days.

item.input: Can I log out of all devices at once?
item.expected_answer: Yes. In Security Settings, select “Log out everywhere.”

item.input: Do you support two-factor authentication (2FA)?
item.expected_answer: Yes, via SMS or authenticator apps.

item.input: What payment methods do you accept?
item.expected_answer: Visa, Mastercard, PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay.

item.input: Is my payment information secure?
item.expected_answer: Yes. We use PCI-DSS standards, tokenization, and TLS encryption.

item.input: Why was my card declined?
item.expected_answer: Common reasons: insufficient funds, expired card, or failed security checks.

item.input: Do you issue invoices?
item.expected_answer: Yes, digital invoices are sent with every order.

item.input: Can I pay with multiple cards?
item.expected_answer: No, each order must be paid with a single method.

item.input: Do you offer installment payments?
item.expected_answer: Yes, through Klarna and Affirm in supported regions.

item.input: Can I get a refund?
item.expected_answer: Yes, within 30 days of delivery. Refunds typically take 5–10 business days to appear on your statement.

item.input: Do you ship internationally?
item.expected_answer: Yes, to over 50 countries.

item.input: How long does shipping take?
item.expected_answer: Standard: 3–5 days. Express: 1–2 days.

item.input: How do I track my order?
item.expected_answer: You’ll receive a tracking link via email after dispatch.

item.input: Do you deliver to PO boxes?
item.expected_answer: Yes, with standard shipping only.

item.input: What if my package is lost?
item.expected_answer: Contact Support with your order number. We’ll investigate and resend or refund.

item.input: Do you offer same-day delivery?
item.expected_answer: Yes, in select major cities.

item.input: How do I return an item?
item.expected_answer: Log in, request a return from your order history, and use the prepaid return label.

item.input: Is return shipping free?
item.expected_answer: Yes, if the product was defective or incorrect. Otherwise, a small fee applies.

item.input: How long until I get my refund?
item.expected_answer: Typically 5–10 business days after we receive the return.

item.input: Can I exchange for a different size?
item.expected_answer: Yes, exchanges are free within 30 days.

item.input: What condition must items be in?
item.expected_answer: Unworn, unused, and in original packaging.

item.input: Where can I find size guides?
item.expected_answer: On every product page under “Size & Fit.”

item.input: Are your products eco-friendly?
item.expected_answer: Yes, many items use recycled or organic materials.

item.input: Do products come with a warranty?
item.expected_answer: Yes. Electronics include a one-year warranty.

item.input: Do you test on animals?
item.expected_answer: No, all products are cruelty-free.

item.input: Can I buy gift cards?
item.expected_answer: Yes, digital and physical versions are available.

item.input: The app won’t load. What do I do?
item.expected_answer: Restart it, clear cache, and update. If the issue persists, reinstall the app.

item.input: Why am I not receiving notifications?
item.expected_answer: Ensure they’re enabled in both the app and your device settings.

item.input: Does the website support screen readers?
item.expected_answer: Yes, fully compliant with accessibility standards.

item.input: How do I report a bug?
item.expected_answer: Submit details in Support → Technical Issues.

item.input: Is my data stored securely?
item.expected_answer: Yes, in data centers with encryption and access controls.

item.input: Do subscriptions auto-renew?
item.expected_answer: Yes, unless manually canceled.

item.input: Can I pause my subscription?
item.expected_answer: Yes, for up to three months.

item.input: Do you offer student discounts?
item.expected_answer: Yes, with valid student verification.

item.input: Can I share with family?
item.expected_answer: Yes, with the Family Plan.

item.input: Do you offer corporate accounts?
item.expected_answer: Yes, through our Enterprise program.

item.input: How do you protect my data?
item.expected_answer: We use encryption, access controls, and anonymization.

item.input: Can I request my data?
item.expected_answer: Yes, request a copy anytime from Support.

item.input: Do you sell my data?
item.expected_answer: No, we never sell personal data.

item.input: How do I unsubscribe from marketing emails?
item.expected_answer: Click “Unsubscribe” at the bottom of any email.

item.input: What’s your cookie policy?
item.expected_answer: We use cookies for personalization and analytics. You can adjust your settings in the preferences center.

item.input: How can I contact support?
item.expected_answer: Through live chat, email, or phone.

item.input: What are support hours?
item.expected_answer: 24/7 online, phone lines Mon–Fri 9–6 local time.

item.input: Do you offer multilingual support?
item.expected_answer: Yes, in English, Spanish, French, and German.

item.input: Is live chat available?
item.expected_answer: Yes, in the app and on our website.

item.input: How do I escalate a complaint?
item.expected_answer: If unresolved, ask to speak to a supervisor or submit a formal complaint via our portal.

item.input: Do you charge for customer support?
item.expected_answer: No, support is free for all customers.

item.input: How quickly will support respond?
item.expected_answer: Live chat replies are usually instant, while email support averages 12–24 hours.

item.input: Can I call support from outside my country?
item.expected_answer: Yes, international numbers are available on our Contact page.

item.input: Do you have a help center or knowledge base?
item.expected_answer: Yes, with step-by-step guides, troubleshooting, and community forums.

item.input: Can I leave feedback on support?
item.expected_answer: Yes, after each interaction we’ll invite you to rate your experience.

item.input: Do you have a loyalty program?
item.expected_answer: Yes, you earn points for every purchase that can be redeemed for discounts.

item.input: How do I check my loyalty points?
item.expected_answer: Log into your account and click on “Rewards.”

item.input: Do loyalty points expire?
item.expected_answer: Yes, after 12 months if unused.

item.input: Can I transfer my rewards to someone else?
item.expected_answer: No, points are non-transferable.

item.input: Do you offer referral bonuses?
item.expected_answer: Yes, you’ll receive a discount when your referral makes their first purchase.

item.input: How can I buy a gift card?
item.expected_answer: Gift cards can be purchased online and delivered by email.

item.input: What values are available?
item.expected_answer: Between $10 and $500.

item.input: Do gift cards expire?
item.expected_answer: No, they never expire.

item.input: Can I use multiple gift cards on one order?
item.expected_answer: Yes, you can combine multiple cards at checkout.

item.input: Can I get a refund for a gift card?
item.expected_answer: No, gift cards are non-refundable.

item.input: Is there a mobile app?
item.expected_answer: Yes, available for iOS and Android.

item.input: Can I shop without creating an account?
item.expected_answer: Yes, you can use guest checkout.

item.input: Do you save my shopping cart?
item.expected_answer: Yes, carts are saved for 7 days if you’re logged in.

item.input: Can I change my order after placing it?
item.expected_answer: Yes, within 30 minutes of checkout.

item.input: What browsers do you support?
item.expected_answer: Chrome, Safari, Firefox, and Edge.

item.input: How do I know if an item is back in stock?
item.expected_answer: Sign up for restock alerts on the product page.

item.input: Do you sell refurbished items?
item.expected_answer: Yes, clearly labeled and discounted.

item.input: Are your products authentic?
item.expected_answer: Yes, all items are sourced directly from manufacturers or verified distributors.

item.input: Do you price match competitors?
item.expected_answer: Yes, within 14 days of your purchase.

item.input: How can I check product availability in stores?
item.expected_answer: Use the “Find in Store” option on the product page.

item.input: Where do I enter a promo code?
item.expected_answer: At checkout under “Apply Promo Code.”

item.input: Can I use multiple promo codes?
item.expected_answer: No, only one per order.

item.input: Do you offer seasonal sales?
item.expected_answer: Yes, during major holidays and events.

item.input: Why didn’t my discount code work?
item.expected_answer: It may have expired or doesn’t apply to sale items.

item.input: Can I get a student discount?
item.expected_answer: Yes, verified students receive 15% off.

item.input: What if I received the wrong item?
item.expected_answer: Contact Support, and we’ll send a replacement or issue a refund.

item.input: My order arrived damaged. What do I do?
item.expected_answer: Take photos of the damage and contact Support for a replacement.

item.input: What if my order is delayed?
item.expected_answer: Track it with the link provided. If it’s past the expected delivery window, reach out to us.

item.input: Can I change my delivery address after ordering?
item.expected_answer: Yes, within 1 hour of placing your order.

item.input: Do you offer weekend delivery?
item.expected_answer: Yes, in select areas.

item.input: Do you offer wholesale pricing?
item.expected_answer: Yes, for verified business accounts.

item.input: Can I collaborate with your brand?
item.expected_answer: Submit partnership requests through our Collaborations page.

item.input: Do you sponsor events or charities?
item.expected_answer: Yes, on a case-by-case basis.

item.input: Do you have an affiliate program?
item.expected_answer: Yes, partners earn commissions on referred sales.

item.input: How can I become a supplier?
item.expected_answer: Fill out the vendor application form on our website.

item.input: What is your cancellation policy?
item.expected_answer: Orders can be canceled within 30 minutes of checkout.

item.input: Do you comply with data privacy laws?
item.expected_answer: Yes, we adhere to strict data protection and privacy standards worldwide.

item.input: What is your warranty policy?
item.expected_answer: All products include a one-year warranty against defects.

item.input: Do you have a price adjustment policy?
item.expected_answer: Yes, if an item goes on sale within 7 days of your purchase.

item.input: What’s your sustainability policy?
item.expected_answer: We’re committed to reducing waste and using eco-friendly packaging.

item.input: Do you offer financing?
item.expected_answer: Yes, through Klarna and Affirm.

item.input: Can I purchase insurance for my order?
item.expected_answer: Yes, at checkout you can add optional package protection.

item.input: Do you ship to military addresses?
item.expected_answer: Yes, we support APO/FPO addresses.

item.input: Can I schedule a delivery date?
item.expected_answer: Yes, choose a preferred date at checkout in supported locations.

item.input: Do you sell internationally exclusive products?
item.expected_answer: Yes, certain collections are available only in specific regions, and this will be clearly marked on the product page.

item.input: Do you allow to pay for friends orders?
item.expected_answer: No, this is not possible, you are responsble for your own orders

item.input: Do you use sustainable packaging?
item.expected_answer: Yes, our packaging is made from 95% recycled or biodegradable materials.

item.input: Are your products carbon neutral?
item.expected_answer: Yes, we offset all carbon emissions from manufacturing and shipping.

item.input: How do you ensure ethical sourcing?
item.expected_answer: We work with certified suppliers who meet international labor and environmental standards.

item.input: Do you support product recycling?
item.expected_answer: Yes, we offer a take-back program for electronics and apparel recycling at no extra cost.

item.input: Do you donate unsold inventory?
item.expected_answer: Yes, unsold items are donated to partner charities rather than discarded.
